session.summary: Local Convex onboarding fixture for Memory Crystal self-hosted development.

memories.title: Memory Crystal local Convex onboarding
memories.content: Memory Crystal local development uses a Docker-primary self-hosted Convex backend on ports 3210 and 3211, then seeds deterministic memories for recall canaries.

memories.title: Local backend env overlay workflow
memories.content: Run the local overlay writer after the backend is healthy so apps/web, the MCP server, scripts, and OpenClaw hooks all point at the same local Convex deployment.

memories.title: Doctor validates local Convex before tests
memories.content: The local doctor should verify the version endpoint, admin key, schema push, deployment environment flags, and at least one seeded vector-searchable memory.

memories.title: Local email stays in dry-run mode
memories.content: When CRYSTAL_EMAIL_DRY_RUN is enabled, local Convex records composed email payloads instead of sending SendGrid messages.

memories.title: Vector canary catches self-hosted recall drift
memories.content: A gated integration test searches for the memory crystal onboarding fixture and fails if self-hosted vector search stops returning a high scoring seeded memory.

messages.content: How do I bring up Memory Crystal with local Convex for onboarding?
Use the Docker-primary local Convex path, write the overlay env files, seed fixtures, then run the doctor and vector canary.

checkpoint.label: Local Convex seed checkpoint
checkpoint.description: Checkpoint over deterministic seed memories used by local integration tests.
checkpoint.semanticSummary: Local Convex development is Docker-primary, env-overlay driven, dry-run guarded, and verified by seeded vector search canaries.

nodes.label: Local Convex
nodes.description: Self-hosted Convex backend used for Memory Crystal contributor development.
